title: Ladle Furnace Shutdown Procedure
steps_text: Reduce load on the ladle furnace gradually and stop feeding new material into the line. Allow residual stock to clear before de-energising the main drive. Isolate power and apply lockout-tagout, then bleed hydraulic and pneumatic pressure to zero. Record final temperatures and any anomalies in the shift log.

title: Cooling Bed Refractory / Lining Inspection SOP
steps_text: Allow the cooling bed to cool to a safe inspection temperature and confirm atmosphere is safe to enter or approach. Visually inspect refractory lining for cracking, spalling and wear, measuring residual thickness at marked reference points. Photograph and log any zones below the minimum thickness threshold. Raise a maintenance work order if wear exceeds the acceptance limit.

title: EOT Crane Shutdown Procedure
steps_text: Reduce load on the eot crane gradually and stop feeding new material into the line. Allow residual stock to clear before de-energising the main drive. Isolate power and apply lockout-tagout, then bleed hydraulic and pneumatic pressure to zero. Record final temperatures and any anomalies in the shift log.

title: Electric Arc Furnace Preventive Maintenance Checklist
steps_text: Perform the scheduled preventive maintenance on the electric arc furnace per the maintenance calendar. Inspect bearings, seals, couplings and drive components for wear, and top up or replace lubricants as specified. Check sensor and instrumentation calibration against reference values. Close out the work order with parts used and observations.

Close out the work order with parts used and observations.

title: Ladle Furnace Shutdown Procedure

Isolate power and apply lockout-tagout, then bleed hydraulic and pneumatic pressure to zero. Record final temperatures and any anomalies in the shift log.

title: Electric Arc Furnace Startup Procedure
steps_text: Confirm all interlocks and emergency stops on the electric arc furnace are healthy before energising. Verify lubrication, coolant and hydraulic pressures are within the specified operating band. Ramp the drive to idle speed and hold while checking for abnormal vibration or noise. Only release to production once temperatures and pressures have stabilised and the shift supervisor has signed off.

title: Ladle Furnace Emergency Response Procedure
steps_text: On detection of an abnormal condition on the ladle furnace, actuate the nearest emergency stop and evacuate personnel from the hazard zone. Notify the control room and shift supervisor immediately. Isolate energy sources and, if safe, contain any spill or leak. Do not restart until a root-cause check and safety clearance are complete.

title: Sinter Plant Feeder Preventive Maintenance & Inspection SOP
steps_text: Perform the scheduled preventive maintenance on the sinter plant feeder per the maintenance calendar. Inspect bearings, seals, couplings and drive components for wear, and top up or replace lubricants as specified. Verify cooling and hydraulic circuits are at specified flow and pressure, and confirm electrical isolation points and drive calibration against reference values. Check sensor and instrumentation readings against the qualified operating envelope and record them in the shift log. Close out the work order with parts used, measured wear values and observations.
